{{Quote|This weapons factory is light-years ahead of all other Separatist technology!|A [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] officer|<ref name="It Takes a Thief">{{CWACite|6|It Takes a Thief}}</ref>}}
This '''[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] Weapons Factory''' was located on the planet [[Diado]], and was used during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Its defenses comprised of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s and [[Cold assault battle droid]]s.

The factory produced variants on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] [[Walker/Legends|walkers]], as well as a [[CIS-Advanced starfighter|starfighter]] which was stolen by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Saesee Tiin/Legends|Saesee Tiin]]. During the theft, Tiin [[Mission to Diado|destroyed]] the facility.

{{Struct-stub}}

*[[Cold assault battle droid]]
